text:
Market today: Sentiment is mixed-to-cautious. The big story moving your names is Broadcom revealing a custom AI chip for OpenAI, directly relevant to your chip-heavy book. Tech and semis could get a pop, but you're already underwater on several positions and margin means any reversal hits harder.

Your holdings: PLTR (-12.35%) is flagged SELL — it's losing ground and has no stop buffer cushion if sentiment shifts. AVGO (-12.02%) is your largest position and flagged TRIM — today's OpenAI chip news could give it a bounce, but you're deep in the red and size is the risk. PTNM (-15.25%) is a tiny spec already down hard with a stop at $9.50 — on margin, this kind of name can blow through stops fast.

Watch: 1) How AVGO trades on the OpenAI chip headline — a relief bounce is your trim opportunity, not a reason to add. 2) PLTR — if it can't hold and reclaim ground soon, the SELL signal stands.

Bottom line: Use any Broadcom-driven strength today to reduce your two biggest bleeding positions — PLTR and AVGO — before margin does it for you.
